metadata.title: Livin' On A Prayer
metadata.lyrics:
[00:38.61] Once upon a time
[00:40.86] Not so long ago
[00:45.88] Tommy used to work on the docks
[00:49.76] Union's been on strike, he's down on his luck
[00:53.29] It's tough, so tough
[01:01.57] Gina works the diner all day
[01:05.55] Working for her man
[01:07.28] She brings home her pay for love
[01:12.04] Mm, for love
[01:16.12] She says, "We've gotta hold on to what we've got
[01:21.02] It doesn't make a difference if we make it or not
[01:25.08] We got each other, and that's a lot for love
[01:30.87] We'll give it a shot"
[01:32.84] Oh, we're half way there
[01:36.86] Oh-oh, livin' on a prayer
[01:40.85] Take my hand, we'll make it, I swear
[01:44.54] Oh-oh, livin' on a prayer
[01:49.79] 
[01:52.30] Tommy's got his six-string in hock
[01:56.36] Now he's holding in what he used to make it talk
[01:59.81] So tough, ooh, it's tough
[02:08.07] Gina dreams of running away
[02:11.63] When she cries in the night, Tommy whispers
[02:14.88] "Baby, it's okay," someday
[02:22.81] We've gotta hold on to what we've got
[02:27.44] It doesn't make a difference if we make it or not
[02:31.33] We got each other, and that's a lot for love
[02:37.21] We'll give it a shot
[02:39.47] Oh, we're half way there

[02:47.15] Take my hand, we'll make it, I swear
[02:50.91] Whoa-oh, livin' on a prayer
[02:54.97] Livin' on a prayer
[02:59.28] 
[03:14.22] Ooh, we gotta hold on, ready or not
[03:20.09] You live for the fight when that's all that you've got

[03:27.62] Whoa-oh, livin' on a prayer
[03:31.47] Take my hand, and we'll make it, I swear
